dashboard.subtitle: Monitor and manage your MDVR devices

LandingPage.heroSubtitle: Advanced MDVR platform for live vehicle monitoring, multi-camera surveillance, video playback, smart alerts, and fleet intelligence — all in one command center.
LandingPage.featuresSubtitle: A complete telematics and video surveillance platform built for enterprise fleet operators.
LandingPage.pricingSubtitle: Flexible plans for every fleet size. Scale up as your operation grows.
LandingPage.footerDesc: Enterprise MDVR fleet management platform. Live tracking, video surveillance, and intelligent analytics for modern fleets.
LandingPage.messageSent: Message sent! We'll be in touch shortly.
LandingPage.messageError: Failed to send. Please try again.
LandingPage.nameTooLong: Name must be less than 100 characters
LandingPage.emailTooLong: Email must be less than 255 characters
LandingPage.messageTooLong: Message must be less than 1000 characters

gpsTracking.title: Real-Time GPS Tracking
gpsTracking.desc: Pinpoint every vehicle on a live map with sub-second updates. View speed, direction, and position history.

liveVideo.title: Live Video Streaming
liveVideo.desc: Stream multi-channel video from any vehicle in real time — front, rear, sides, and cabin.

routeHistory.title: Route History Playback
routeHistory.desc: Replay any vehicle's full journey with timestamps, stops, and event markers.

remoteDownload.title: Remote Video Download
remoteDownload.desc: Retrieve video clips directly from MDVR devices over-the-air without dispatching a technician.

driverBehavior.title: Driver Behavior Analysis
driverBehavior.desc: Detect harsh braking, rapid acceleration, cornering, and fatigue events automatically.

geofencing.title: Geofence Management
geofencing.desc: Draw virtual boundaries and receive instant alerts when vehicles enter or exit defined zones.

overspeed.title: Overspeed Alerts
overspeed.desc: Get notified the moment a vehicle exceeds preset speed thresholds with visual and push alerts.

panicButton.title: Panic / Emergency Events
panicButton.desc: Drivers can trigger an emergency signal that instantly notifies supervisors with location and video.

fuelIgnition.title: Fuel & Ignition Monitoring
fuelIgnition.desc: Track fuel levels and ignition state with real-time notifications for anomalies or siphoning.

centralDash.title: Centralized Dashboard
centralDash.desc: Manage your entire fleet from a single command center with role-based access control.

multiUser.title: Multi-User Access
multiUser.desc: Create sub-accounts with custom permissions for dispatchers, managers, and field operators.

reportsExport.title: Reports & Export
reportsExport.desc: Generate detailed PDF/Excel reports on mileage, events, driver scores, and fleet utilization.

overview.title: See the Platform
overview.subtitle: Explore the core capabilities that give fleet operators total visibility and control.

liveTracking.title: Know Where Every Vehicle Is, Right Now
liveTracking.desc: Real-time GPS positions with 1-second refresh, live speed, heading, and telemetry data across your entire fleet on a single map view.

multiCamera.title: See Inside and Outside Every Vehicle
multiCamera.desc: Stream live video from up to 8 cameras per vehicle — front, rear, cabin, and side channels — all accessible from the central platform.

playback.title: Replay Any Incident with Precision
playback.desc: Access recorded footage synchronized with GPS and sensor data. Navigate to any point in time and download clips as evidence.

smartAlerts.title: React Instantly to Critical Events
smartAlerts.desc: Configurable real-time alert engine for overspeed, geofence violations, harsh driving, panic events, and system faults.

routeHistory.title: Map Every Journey and Define Boundaries
routeHistory.desc: Full route history with stop detection, idle time analysis, and custom geofence zones with entry/exit triggers.

fleetAnalytics.title: Data-Driven Decisions for Your Fleet
fleetAnalytics.desc: Comprehensive analytics covering driver scoring, fuel efficiency, utilization rates, and operational KPIs with exportable reports.

why.title: Built for
why.subtitle: Six compelling reasons why leading fleet operators choose ApexCam for their mission-critical operations.
why.ctaText: Enterprise-grade. Proven at scale. Ready to deploy.
why.ctaSubtext: Trusted by logistics companies, transit authorities, and field fleets across the region.

safety.title: Improve Fleet Safety
safety.desc: Reduce accidents with real-time monitoring, driver behavior coaching, and proactive incident detection.

visibility.title: Eliminate Blind Spots
visibility.desc: Get total operational visibility — every vehicle, every camera, every event — in one place, in real time.

protection.title: Protect Assets & Drivers
protection.desc: Deter theft, monitor cargo integrity, and ensure driver well-being with 24/7 surveillance and panic alerts.

response.title: Faster Incident Response
response.desc: React to events in seconds. Video evidence, location, and alerts delivered instantly to your operations team.

accountability.title: Build Accountability
accountability.desc: Detailed driver logs, trip reports, and video evidence create a culture of responsibility across your fleet.

evidence.title: Instant Visual Evidence
evidence.desc: Settle disputes and insurance claims with timestamped HD video tied to GPS coordinates and event data.

industries.title: Built for
industries.subtitle: ApexCam serves a wide range of fleet verticals with purpose-built monitoring configurations.

logistics.title: Logistics Fleets
logistics.desc: Track cargo vehicles, monitor load security, and optimize delivery routes across regional and national operations.

publicTransport.title: Public Transportation
publicTransport.desc: Passenger safety cameras, stop compliance, schedule tracking, and driver behavior monitoring for bus and rail.

schoolBuses.title: School Buses
schoolBuses.desc: Protect children with interior cameras, stop-arm monitoring, route compliance, and parent notification alerts.

taxiFleets.title: Taxi & Ride-Hailing
taxiFleets.desc: Driver and passenger protection, fare dispute resolution with video evidence, and real-time dispatch visibility.

delivery.title: Delivery Vehicles
delivery.desc: Last-mile delivery tracking, package security monitoring, and proof-of-delivery with timestamped footage.

construction.title: Construction & Field Ops
construction.desc: Monitor heavy equipment, track service vehicles in remote areas, and enforce geofence compliance on job sites.

dashPreview.title: The Command Center
dashPreview.subtitle: A unified dashboard built for fleet operators who need total visibility and instant control.

t1.quote: ApexCam transformed how we manage our 200-vehicle logistics fleet. The live video and GPS combination gives our ops team full visibility — something we never had before.
t1.name: Mohammed T.

t2.quote: We reduced accident-related costs by 40% within 6 months. The driver behavior monitoring and instant alert system made all the difference.
t2.name: Sarah A.

t3.quote: The dashboard mockup alone closed the deal for us. Once we saw the real platform, we knew this was enterprise-grade. Implementation was smooth and support is outstanding.
t3.name: Rami K.

pricing.footerNote: All plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required. Cancel anytime.

starter.name: Starter
starter.desc: For small fleets getting started with MDVR monitoring.

professional.name: Professional
professional.desc: For growing fleets that need advanced monitoring and analytics.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.desc: Unlimited scale. Custom SLA. Dedicated support team.

contact.subtitle: Tell us about your fleet and we'll tailor a demo to your specific operation.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your fleet, current challenges, or specific features you're interested in...
